    # Copilot Instructions

## Context
This repository is the public mirror of the Xurrent iPaaS connector code. It contains two sub-projects (`connector` and `connector-sdk`).
Follow the global rules first, then layer in sub-project specific rules for any code you modify.

Always adhere to the project rules defined in the root [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md).

For sub-project specific rules, refer to:
- [connector/AGENTS.md](../connector/AGENTS.md)
- [connector-sdk/AGENTS.md](../connector-sdk/AGENTS.md)
